entry_a.title: Runtime-tunable knobs go in System tab, not .env
entry_a.content: Feature flags and runtime thresholds should be editable without redeploying — expose them in the dashboard System tab. .env is for deploy-time identity/secrets only.

entry_b.title: Deploy-time model defaults live in HydraFlowConfig
entry_b.content: Model choices and CLI backends are set via HYDRAFLOW_<STAGE>=tool:model combos in .env. HydraFlowConfig fields hold the canonical defaults; env vars override per deployment.

notes: Adjacent topic (configuration) but the rules disagree on where settings should live — runtime UI vs. deploy-time env.
